artPrompt: A widescreen film-still of a ramshackle municipal snack bar shack ablaze with greasy glory in a rioting town square at night, its open hatch glowing with bonfire-orange light, a chewed ceremonial ribbon dangling at the counter amid spilled dice and coins; embers, sparks, and confetti rain over overturned boxes and torn blank bunting, flame orange against night-black smoke, gleeful civic anarchy, no figures, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Mayor McChaos Municipal Snack Bar
subtitle: Now Serving: Whatever
text:
When the Snack Bar enters the battlefield, roll a six-sided die.
1-2: It enters tapped (the fryer is preheating).
3-4: Nothing happens, but you smell fries.
5-6: Create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token; it is the new line cook.
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}: Add {R}. Activate this ability only while you are holding or eating a snack.
flavorText: Gnasher cut the ribbon with his teeth. Twice. For the photos.
